metadata.title: Learning Graphs: The Key to Intelligent Textbooks
metadata.description: A learning graph covering the data structures, standards, and workflows used to design, validate, visualize, and generate interactive intelligent textbooks — concept dependency graphs (CDGs), taxonomies, generative-AI concept enumeration, vis.js visualization, and the learning-science foundations that justify DAG-based instructional sequencing.
metadata.creator: Dan McCreary

SKILL.classifierName: Agent Skills for Learning Graph Generation
